consultants.name: Natalie Ward
consultants.title: Principal Cyber Risk Consultant
consultants.bio: Natalie specializes in Cyber Risk Assessment and regulatory readiness for mid-market Financial Services firms, including regional banks, credit unions, and fintech lenders. She has led dozens of FFIEC-aligned reviews, ransomware tabletop exercises, and third-party risk assessments for organizations between 100 and 2,000 employees.

consultants.name: David Chen
consultants.title: Senior Cloud Security & Risk Advisor
consultants.bio: David helps Financial Services and technology organizations securely adopt cloud platforms. His work includes designing cloud security reference architectures, implementing zero trust access, and conducting cyber risk assessments against NIST CSF and ISO 27001.

consultants.name: Marisol Rojas
consultants.title: Incident Response & Healthcare Security Lead
consultants.bio: Marisol leads incident response planning and breach readiness engagements for hospitals and healthcare networks. She has extensive experience building IR playbooks, coordinating tabletop exercises, and helping organizations align with HIPAA and HITECH requirements.

consultants.name: Arjun Singh
consultants.title: Retail & eCommerce Security Strategist
consultants.bio: Arjun focuses on cyber risk for retail and eCommerce, advising on PCI DSS, fraud prevention controls, and 24/7 security monitoring strategies for distributed store environments.

consultants.name: Eva Müller
consultants.title: OT & Manufacturing Security Consultant
consultants.bio: Eva advises manufacturing organizations on securing OT and ICS environments. She leads risk assessments, network segmentation projects, and OT incident response planning for plants worldwide.

consultants.name: Christopher Jones
consultants.title: Public Sector & Education Security Advisor
consultants.bio: Christopher helps K-12, higher education, and local government clients build pragmatic cyber risk programs, with an emphasis on ransomware resilience and improve incident response maturity.

consultants.name: Hiro Kobayashi
consultants.title: ISO 27001 Lead Auditor
consultants.bio: Hiro is a certified ISO 27001 Lead Auditor who guides organizations through readiness assessments, internal audits, and remediation planning to achieve and maintain certification.

consultants.name: Samir Ali
consultants.title: Cloud & DevSecOps Consultant
consultants.bio: Samir works with engineering and security teams to embed security into CI/CD pipelines, cloud-native applications, and containerized workloads across AWS, Azure, and GCP.

consultants.name: Elena Garcia
consultants.title: Data Privacy & Compliance Consultant
consultants.bio: Elena supports organizations across healthcare, retail, and financial services in building privacy-by-design programs aligned with GDPR, CCPA, and sector-specific regulations.

consultants.name: Marcus Owens
consultants.title: Incident Response Program Architect
consultants.bio: Marcus designs incident response retainers and playbooks for organizations seeking 24/7 coverage and rapid containment, with experience across manufacturing, retail, and technology sectors.

consultants.name: Thao Nguyen
consultants.title: Executive Security & Board Advisor
consultants.bio: Thao coaches executive teams and boards on cyber risk, translating technical issues into business terms and helping define risk appetite, metrics, and investment roadmaps.

consultants.name: Rina Patel
consultants.title: SMB Security Advisor
consultants.bio: Rina focuses on small and midsize businesses across sectors, providing pragmatic guidance on security basics, managed detection and response, and awareness training programs.

newsletters.name: Executive Risk Briefing
newsletters.description: A concise monthly briefing for executives summarizing key cyber risk trends, major breaches, and practical actions for boards and leadership teams.

newsletters.name: Threat Intelligence Digest
newsletters.description: Weekly highlights of emerging threats, critical vulnerabilities, and exploit activity relevant to mid-market organizations.

newsletters.name: Cloud Security Insights
newsletters.description: Deep dives into securing cloud workloads, zero trust patterns, and practical guardrails for engineering and security teams.

newsletters.name: Security Awareness & Training Updates
newsletters.description: Updates on new courses, phishing simulation campaigns, and best practices for building a security-aware culture.

retainer_addons.name: 24x7 Global On-Call Window
retainer_addons.description: Extend the standard business-hours incident response retainer to full 24x7 on-call coverage across all time zones.

retainer_addons.name: Evening & Weekend On-Call
retainer_addons.description: Adds weekday evening and weekend on-call coverage for high-priority incidents without full 24x7 pricing.

retainer_addons.name: Executive Incident Reporting Pack
retainer_addons.description: Quarterly executive-ready incident and readiness report with metrics, trends, and board-level talking points.

retainer_addons.name: Additional Tabletop Exercise (2x per year)
retainer_addons.description: Two additional remote tabletop exercises per year focused on ransomware and business email compromise.

retainer_addons.name: Managed EDR Platform
retainer_addons.description: Licensing and management of an enterprise-grade endpoint detection and response platform for up to 250 endpoints.

retainer_addons.name: Dark Web Credential Monitoring
retainer_addons.description: Monitoring for exposed corporate credentials and brand mentions on dark web marketplaces and forums.

risk_questions.text: Does your organization have a dedicated security team (full-time staff responsible for cybersecurity)?
To what extent does your organization rely on public cloud services for critical systems?
What percentage of employee accounts are protected with multi-factor authentication (MFA)?
How many third-party vendors have access to your internal systems or sensitive data?
Which of the following best describes your backup and recovery posture for ransomware scenarios?
Which security awareness activities do you provide to employees at least annually?

service_categories.name: Vulnerability Assessment
service_categories.description: Network, application, and cloud vulnerability assessments with prioritized remediation guidance.

service_categories.name: Compliance & Audit
service_categories.description: ISO 27001 audits, regulatory gap assessments, and control testing for key compliance frameworks.

service_categories.name: Managed Services
service_categories.description: Ongoing incident response retainers, security monitoring, and virtual CISO services.

service_categories.name: Security Monitoring
service_categories.description: 24/7 security monitoring plans with defined SLAs and endpoint coverage options.

service_categories.name: Training & Awareness
service_categories.description: Security awareness courses, phishing simulations, and role-based technical training.

service_categories.name: Consultations
service_categories.description: Book 1:1 virtual consultations with expert security consultants across key industries.

service_categories.name: Incident Response
service_categories.description: On-demand and retainer-based incident response services for security breaches.

training_courses.title: Security Awareness Essentials with Phishing Simulation
training_courses.description: A practical security awareness course for all employees that covers password hygiene, safe browsing, email security, and social engineering. Includes ongoing phishing simulation campaigns with realistic scenarios tailored to your organization.

training_courses.title: Micro-Learning Security Awareness Series
training_courses.description: Short, focused security awareness modules delivered monthly to keep key risks top-of-mind. Topics include phishing recognition, safe remote work, and mobile device security.

training_courses.title: Phishing & Business Email Compromise Deep Dive
training_courses.description: An in-depth look at phishing, spear phishing, and business email compromise. Includes live simulations, red team-style campaigns, and guidance on reporting suspicious messages.

training_courses.title: Executive Cyber Risk Briefing
training_courses.description: A concise workshop for executives and board members covering current threat trends, regulatory expectations, and how to interpret cyber risk metrics.

training_courses.title: ISO 27001 Foundation Training
training_courses.description: An introduction to ISO 27001 concepts, requirements, and implementation approaches for ISMS owners and project leaders.

training_courses.title: Incident Response Fundamentals
training_courses.description: Covers the full incident response lifecycle, from preparation and detection through containment, eradication, and lessons learned, with hands-on tabletop scenarios.

training_courses.title: Cloud Security Basics for Engineers
training_courses.description: Introduces core cloud security principles, identity and access management, and secure configuration for AWS, Azure, and GCP.

training_courses.title: Red Team-Informed Security Awareness
training_courses.description: Combines red team insights with targeted employee awareness training. Includes custom phishing simulations based on actual attack paths observed in your environment.

training_courses.title: Healthcare Security & Privacy Awareness
training_courses.description: Role-based awareness training for clinical and administrative staff, focusing on PHI handling, ransomware risks, and phishing targeting healthcare organizations.

training_courses.title: Introduction to DevSecOps
training_courses.description: Teaches development and operations teams how to integrate security practices into agile workflows and CI/CD pipelines.

training_courses.title: Ransomware Response Tabletop Workshop
training_courses.description: A scenario-based workshop where IT, security, and business leaders walk through a realistic ransomware attack and practice coordinated response.

training_courses.title: Privacy by Design for Product Teams
training_courses.description: Helps product managers and engineers integrate privacy considerations into product lifecycle, from ideation to decommissioning.

newsletter_topics.name: Cloud Security
newsletter_topics.description: Updates on cloud security risks, controls, and executive-level guidance for cloud adoption.

newsletter_topics.name: Ransomware
newsletter_topics.description: Insight into ransomware trends, notable incidents, and preparedness recommendations for leadership.

newsletter_topics.name: Regulatory Compliance
newsletter_topics.description: Coverage of evolving regulatory expectations, enforcement actions, and compliance priorities.

newsletter_topics.name: Third-Party & Supply Chain Risk
newsletter_topics.description: Focus on managing cybersecurity risk arising from vendors, partners, and supply chains.

newsletter_topics.name: Critical Vulnerabilities & Threat Alerts
newsletter_topics.description: Timely alerts on high-impact vulnerabilities and active exploit campaigns.

newsletter_topics.name: Security Awareness & Phishing
newsletter_topics.description: Updates on new awareness modules, phishing simulation templates, and behavior change tips.

services.name: Vulnerability Assessment
services.short_description: Comprehensive vulnerability assessments for networks, applications, and cloud workloads.
services.long_description: Our vulnerability assessment service identifies, prioritizes, and explains weaknesses across your infrastructure, applications, and cloud environments. Engagements range from rapid 72-hour assessments for smaller environments to multi-phase programs for complex enterprises, with clear remediation guidance and executive-ready reporting.

services.name: ISO 27001 Compliance Audit
services.short_description: ISO 27001 readiness and certification support tailored to your organization’s size and complexity.
services.long_description: This service provides ISO 27001 readiness assessments, internal audits, and remediation planning to help you achieve and maintain certification. Packages are optimized for different organization sizes, including focused offerings for 200-employee environments with project timelines under eight weeks.

services.name: 24/7 Security Monitoring
services.short_description: Managed detection and response with 24/7 eyes-on-glass and sub-30-minute SLAs.
services.long_description: Our managed security monitoring service delivers 24/7 visibility across endpoints, networks, and cloud platforms. Multiple plan tiers provide different endpoint coverage levels, all with rapid response SLAs under 30 minutes and pricing options suitable for growing organizations.

services.name: Incident Response Retainer
services.short_description: Configurable retainer with remote and on-site hours to ensure rapid incident response.
services.long_description: Build a tailored incident response retainer with a mix of remote and on-site hours, extended on-call options, and value-add services such as tabletop exercises and executive reporting. The configurator helps you stay under budget while maximizing available support hours.

services.name: Cyber Risk Assessment Consultation
services.short_description: One-hour virtual consultations with industry-specialized experts to review your cyber risk posture.
services.long_description: Schedule a 60-minute virtual session with a consultant who specializes in your industry—such as financial services, healthcare, or retail. Discuss your current risk posture, clarify priorities, and receive a concise set of recommendations and next steps.

services.name: Security Training & Awareness
services.short_description: Catalog of security awareness, phishing simulation, and technical training courses.
services.long_description: Browse live virtual, in-person, and self-paced courses covering security awareness, phishing simulation campaigns, ransomware readiness, cloud security, ISO 27001, and more. Flexible per-seat and volume pricing options are available for teams of all sizes.

services.name: Cyber Risk Calculator
services.short_description: Interactive tool to estimate your cyber risk score and recommended mitigation services.
services.long_description: Use the cyber risk calculator to input key details such as industry, employee count, revenue, and control maturity. The tool generates a risk score and presents prioritized mitigation services so you can quickly move from assessment to action.

services.name: Security Newsletters
services.short_description: Subscribe to curated newsletters including the Executive Risk Briefing.
services.long_description: Stay informed with curated newsletters such as the Executive Risk Briefing, Threat Intelligence Digest, and Security Awareness & Training Updates. Configure your preferred frequency and select topical interests like cloud security, ransomware, and regulatory compliance.

case_studies.title: Regional Hospital Cuts Ransomware Breaches by 60% with 24/7 Monitoring
case_studies.summary: A 450-bed regional hospital implemented 24/7 security monitoring, an incident response retainer, and frontline security awareness training, resulting in a 60% reduction in ransomware and malware-related security incidents within nine months.

case_studies.title: Specialty Clinic Reduces Phishing-Driven Breaches by 45% in Six Months
case_studies.summary: A multi-location specialty clinic rolled out a phishing-focused security awareness program and executive risk briefings, achieving a 45% reduction in phishing-driven breaches and credential theft in just six months.

case_studies.title: Healthcare System Aligns with ISO 27001 and Cuts Breach Impact by 40%
case_studies.summary: UrbanCare Health System pursued ISO 27001 alignment across three hospitals and outpatient clinics, reducing breach impact by 40% and improving audit readiness in under 11 months.

case_studies.title: Community Clinic Improves Email Security but Faces Legacy System Constraints
case_studies.summary: Riverbend Community Clinic implemented basic email security controls and annual awareness training, achieving a 30% reduction in minor security incidents over 14 months while planning for broader infrastructure upgrades.

case_studies.title: Mid-Market Bank Achieves ISO 27001 Readiness in Seven Weeks
case_studies.summary: FirstRiver Bank used a focused ISO 27001 readiness package and vulnerability assessments to prepare for certification in just seven weeks, improving control coverage and audit confidence.

case_studies.title: Retailer Cuts Fraud and Malware Incidents by 50% with MDR
case_studies.summary: A national retail chain deployed 24/7 security monitoring across 600 stores and eCommerce platforms, cutting confirmed fraud and malware incidents by 50% over 10 months.

case_studies.title: SaaS Provider Lowers Cloud Risk Score by 35% via Targeted Remediation
case_studies.summary: CloudLine Apps used the cyber risk calculator and follow-on consulting to prioritize remediation, reducing their quantified cloud risk score by 35% within six months.

case_studies.title: Manufacturer Reduces OT Security Incidents by 42% After Network Segmentation
case_studies.summary: PrecisionFab Manufacturing implemented OT network segmentation, 24/7 monitoring for critical plants, and an incident response retainer, reducing OT security incidents by 42% in a year.

case_studies.title: City Government Boosts Ransomware Resilience with Tabletop Exercises
case_studies.summary: The City of Westbridge conducted quarterly ransomware tabletop exercises and refined its incident response playbooks, reducing recovery time objectives by 30% across critical services.

case_studies.title: University Builds Security Culture with Phishing Simulations
case_studies.summary: Central State University introduced campus-wide phishing simulations and targeted awareness training, cutting successful phishing attempts by 38% in the first academic year.

case_studies.title: Executive Guide to Emerging Cyber Risk Trends
case_studies.summary: This whitepaper summarizes the top cyber risk trends impacting mid-market organizations, including ransomware, third-party breaches, and cloud misconfigurations.

iso27001_audit_packages.name: ISO 27001 Standard Package (50–150 Employees)
iso27001_audit_packages.description: Designed for small organizations building an ISMS for the first time, including readiness assessment, internal audit sampling, and remediation roadmap.

iso27001_audit_packages.name: ISO 27001 Fast-Track Package (100–250 Employees)
iso27001_audit_packages.description: Optimized for mid-sized organizations with 100–250 staff. Includes scoped readiness assessment, focused internal audit, and prioritized remediation workshops to reach audit readiness in under eight weeks.

iso27001_audit_packages.name: ISO 27001 Enhanced Package (251–500 Employees)
iso27001_audit_packages.description: For organizations with complex environments and multiple locations. Provides extended control testing, detailed risk treatment planning, and support through external certification audits.

iso27001_audit_packages.name: ISO 27001 Enterprise Program (500+ Employees)
iso27001_audit_packages.description: Multi-phase ISO 27001 implementation and audit program for large enterprises and distributed organizations, including governance design and continuous improvement support.

monitoring_plans.name: Core 24/7 Monitoring (Up to 250 Endpoints)
monitoring_plans.description: Entry-level 24/7 monitoring for growing organizations, covering up to 250 endpoints with sub-30-minute response SLAs.
other_features: Log collection from servers and endpoints

monitoring_plans.name: Plus 24/7 Monitoring (Up to 500 Endpoints)
monitoring_plans.description: Expanded 24/7 monitoring with broader endpoint coverage, cloud integration, and faster response SLAs.
other_features: Endpoint, server, and cloud log integration

monitoring_plans.name: Advanced 24/7 Monitoring (Up to 1,000 Endpoints)
monitoring_plans.description: High-capacity 24/7 monitoring with proactive threat hunting, EDR integration, and dedicated service manager.

monitoring_plans.name: Business-Hours Monitoring (Up to 150 Endpoints)
monitoring_plans.description: Monitoring during local business hours only, suitable for low-risk environments or budget-conscious teams.

monitoring_plans.name: Global Enterprise Monitoring (Custom)
monitoring_plans.description: Fully customized monitoring for global enterprises with multiple SOC integrations, custom SLAs, and compliance reporting.

monitoring_plans.name: Cloud-Only 24/7 Monitoring
monitoring_plans.description: 24/7 monitoring for cloud workloads only, ideal for cloud-native startups and SaaS platforms.

monitoring_plans.name: Branch Location Add-On (Per 100 Endpoints)
monitoring_plans.description: Add-on plan to extend monitoring coverage to branch locations in increments of 100 endpoints.

vulnerability_assessment_plans.name: Basic Rapid Assessment
vulnerability_assessment_plans.description: A focused vulnerability assessment for smaller environments, delivering prioritized findings within three days.
vulnerability_assessment_plans.max_scope_description: Up to 50 externally facing IPs and 2 web applications.

vulnerability_assessment_plans.name: Standard Comprehensive Assessment
vulnerability_assessment_plans.description: Balanced coverage for mid-sized organizations, including internal and external infrastructure with application spot checks.
vulnerability_assessment_plans.max_scope_description: Up to 150 servers, 100 workstations, and 5 key web applications.

vulnerability_assessment_plans.name: Premium Multi-Phase Assessment
vulnerability_assessment_plans.description: In-depth multi-phase assessment with retesting, executive workshops, and roadmap development.
vulnerability_assessment_plans.max_scope_description: Up to 300 servers, 300 workstations, 10 web applications, and 2 cloud environments.

vulnerability_assessment_plans.name: Enterprise Custom Assessment
vulnerability_assessment_plans.description: Fully customized vulnerability assessment program for large or highly regulated environments.
vulnerability_assessment_plans.max_scope_description: Customized scope across data centers, endpoints, and cloud platforms as defined in a statement of work.

consultation_bookings.meeting_purpose: Review cloud migration risks and current ransomware exposure for core banking platform.
Initial cyber risk consultation focusing on regulatory expectations and risk appetite definition.
Design an incident response playbook for ransomware, including on-call escalation and communication templates.
Discuss expansion of 24/7 security monitoring to new branch locations and eCommerce platform.
Plan a ransomware resilience program, including awareness training and incident response exercises for campus IT.
